rationale: Educ. Code §29.205 governs school district contract authority for public education grant services. It does not reference homestead exemptions, appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may contract under Section 11.157 for the provision of educational services to a district student eligible to receive a public education grant under Section 29.202.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this education grant contract authority provision.
